content:
🚨 ***Warning: Immediate Action Required*** 🚨 

It has come to our attention that several members of this community are engaging in serious rule violations, specifically harassment and trolling directed at the live streamer during voice chat sessions.

This behavior is a direct violation of our server rules. We have a zero-tolerance policy for harassment, and this kind of conduct will not be tolerated.

***Consequences for Violations:***

Immediate Mute/Deafen: Any user found engaging in this behavior will be instantly muted and deafened in voice channels.

Warning and Timeout: A formal warning will be issued, followed by a timeout if the behavior continues.

Permanent Ban: Repeat offenders or those engaging in severe harassment will be permanently removed from the server.

***Moving Forward:***

Please respect your fellow members and the live streamer. We strive to maintain a positive, welcoming environment for everyone. If you cannot abide by these simple rules, this is not the community for you.

We are actively monitoring the situation. Play nice, be respectful, and enjoy the stream.

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

🚨警告：必须立即采取行动🚨 

我们注意到，本社区部分成员存在严重违反规则的行为，尤其是在语音聊天期间对直播主播进行骚扰和恶意攻击。 

这种行为直接违反了我们的服务器规则。我们对骚扰行为采取零容忍政策，绝不容忍此类行为。 

违规后果： 

立即禁言/静音：任何被发现有此类行为的用户将被立即禁言并静音。 

警告和临时封禁：我们将发出正式警告，如果此类行为持续发生，将被暂时禁言。 

永久封禁：屡犯者或进行严重骚扰者将被永久移除出服务器。 

后续措施： 请尊重其他成员和直播主播。我们致力于为所有人营造积极友好的氛围。如果您无法遵守这些简单的规则，那么这个社区可能并不适合您。 

我们正在密切关注事态发展。请友善待人，尊重他人，并享受直播。

I want to happily announce that we have unlocked a custom server invite link:
discord.gg/morimens <:Cheerup:1400771555939844149> 

Additionally, I want to introduce our bot dedicated for this server (<@1372028651175936080>). It will help us to auto-moderate the server from scam messages (there's more function, try to type `!help`  in <#1436913827571695898> ). If you kindly have suggestions and feedback about the bot, you can kindly DM me. <:bow:1356053037159944473> 

Don't forget to behave nicely to others, have a nice day! <:Sendflowers:1400771545370067118>
